LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SZE HO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLEADED THE INAPPLICABILITY OF THE RENT ORDINANCE. DEFENDANT IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B)AND(C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

Appearances:
Plaintiff, Wells Fargo Bank is present. Represented by Aaron Kareg
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Shi Hunh and Sze Ho, are present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-04-2010 is vacated.
